hero.title: Leadership and Intellectual Capital
hero.quote: Excellence in consulting is born from the combination of academic rigor, practical experience and a deep understanding of power dynamics.

members.name: Alejandro Méndez
members.bio: PhD in Political Science, Harvard. Former presidential advisor with over 20 years of experience in political strategy.

members.name: Carolina Vásquez
members.bio: Master in Applied Statistics, U. de Chile. Specialist in social research methodologies and data analysis.

members.name: Roberto Fuentes
members.bio: Lawyer, PUC. Former government undersecretary with extensive network of institutional contacts.

members.name: María José Soto
members.bio: MBA, Wharton. Experience in investment banking and strategic consulting at McKinsey.

members.name: Felipe Araya
members.bio: Economist, U. of Cambridge. Specialist in econometrics and predictive models.

members.name: Valentina Reyes
members.bio: Journalist, Columbia U. Former political editor at international media outlets.

members.name: Andrés Molina
members.bio: Sociologist, Oxford. Senior researcher with publications in high-impact academic journals.

cta.title: Join our team
cta.description: We are looking for exceptional professionals who share our passion for rigorous analysis and excellence.
